author: world today news
title: Premier Li Qiang: The government will continue to support high-end manufacturing and the construction of a modern industrial system ‚Äì
text:
/ world today news/ Chinese Premier Li Qiang said that it is necessary to prioritize high-quality development, emphasizing the real economy and high-end production, so as to speed up the construction of a modern industrial system.
Li made these comments during a working visit and participation in a symposium on the development of advanced manufacturing in Hunan Province.
In the city of Zhuzhou, he learned about the industrial transformation efforts of several companies, including the train manufacturing factory CRRC Zhuzhou Locomotive Co., Ltd. According to the prime minister, the development of advanced production depends mainly on innovation and specialists. ‚ÄúThe value and vitality of technological innovation lies in its application,‚Äù Li said, calling for closer interaction between real business and science, as well as raising product standards and quality.
While visiting enterprises in Changsha, the capital of Hunan province, Li noted that China must continue its efforts to create world-leading companies that use special and sophisticated technologies to produce new and unique products.
At a symposium on the development of advanced manufacturing industry, Li Qiang noted that ‚Äúthe real economy, especially the manufacturing sector, is the very foundation of China‚Äôs economy.‚Äù ‚ÄúDue to the complex and profound changes in the internal and external environment, China‚Äôs manufacturing sector is also at a pivotal moment,‚Äù the premier stressed. He reiterated the importance of promoting the transformation and upgrading of the traditional manufacturing sector, the cultivation and development of strategic emerging industries.
